data.title: Ohio's 529 plan receives national recognition for excellence. An increase of 15% in new accounts.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has increased to 7.2%, marking a significant rise from the previous month. The number of job seekers has also surged to 1.5 million, the highest on record in the past year. Additionally, the report highlighted a decrease in the number of job vacancies by 12%, indicating a challenging labor market. The government is considering implementing new measures to address this alarming trend and boost economic growth.

data.title: Roadzen to showcase DrivebuddyAI at CES 2026, with live demos highlighting its AI platform trained on billions of kilometers of driving data, validated under Indian AIS-184 and EU GSR 2144 standards.
data.description: Witness live demonstrations in Las Vegas showcasing DrivebuddyAI's cutting-edge AI platform that prioritizes vision and continuous learning. This platform, trained on an extensive dataset spanning billions of kilometers of actual driving experiences, stands out as the sole driver monitoring system approved under both Indian AIS-184 and EU GSR 2144 regulations. Explore the innovative capabilities of DrivebuddyAI firsthand at the event in Las Vegas.

data.title: Law firm Hagens Berman probing Klarna amid 102% spike in credit loss provision risk tied to Fair Financing growth.
data.description: Attorney Reed Kathrein is probing possible misrepresentation of provision trends and lending risk by management. San Francisco, December 23, 2025 - Shareholder rights law firm Hagens Berman is investigating potential securities law violations by Klarna Group. The firm is looking into whether management misrepresented these trends.

data.title: CT United FC appoints Shavar Thomas as first Head Coach, aiming for MLS NEXT Pro and MLS success. Bridgeport, Dec. 23, 2025.
data.description: CT United FC has appointed former MLS Top-10 draft pick, National Team Captain, and Championship Coach Shavar Thomas as their inaugural Head Coach. The announcement was made on December 23, 2025, at Bridgeport, Conn. Thomas will lead the club into MLS NEXT Pro and work towards achieving their MLS aspirations. This move marks a significant step for CT United FC, with high hopes for Thomas' leadership to propel the team to success.

data.title: RZLT shares plummet 90% after lead asset trial failure on Dec 11, 2025. Hagens Berman investigating losses.
data.description: Investors who suffered losses are advised to get in touch with the company in SAN FRANCISCO as per the news from December 23, 2025. On December 11, 2025, shareholders of Rezolute, Inc. (NASDAQ: RZLT) experienced a significant drop in share price, plummeting up to 90% during intraday trading. This decline followed the company's announcement of the failure of its...

data.title: Hagens Berman is investigating Ardent Health's $97M reserve issue causing a 33% stock drop. Leadership awareness under scrutiny.
data.description: Reed Kathrein, the lead partner, is emphasizing the importance of understanding the level of leadership awareness surrounding chronic issues relating to payor denials and collectability. This investigation, initiated by the well-known shareholder rights law firm Hagens Berman, is centered around possible securities violations. The focus is on determining the scale of leadership's knowledge regarding these issues. The news was announced on December 23, 2025, in San Francisco.

data.title: Preserve Sporting Club completes $88M Cozy Cabin Village with 60 luxury tiny homes, marking the largest fourth-season sporting club in New England.
data.description: In Richmond, Rhode Island, on December 23, 2025, The Preserve Sporting Club & Resort, which is recognized as New England's top four-season sporting club and a Preferred Hotel & Resort, has revealed the $88 million Cozy Cabin Village completion. This development has increased the total number of luxury tiny homes to 60, making it the largest village of its kind in the area.

data.title: GreenTree Hospitality Group Q3 2025: Total revenue down 15% to RMB303.6M ($42.6M), income RMB70.1M ($9.8M), net income RMB60.3M ($8.5M)
data.description: Revenue experienced a 15.0% year-on-year decline, amounting to RMB303.6 million (US$42.6 million). Operating income stood at RMB70.1 million (US$9.8 million), down from RMB106.4 million in the third quarter of 2024. Net income for the period totaled RMB60.3 million (US$8.5 million), a decrease from the previous figure of RMB65.2 million.

data.title: Big Screen Entertainment Group expands beauty strategy with Hollywood Legends, completes Episode 4 of documentary series at The Hollywood Museum. #BSEG #beauty #Hollywood
data.description: On December 23, 2025, Big Screen Entertainment Group (BSEG) finished filming Episode 4 of its documentary series, Hollywood Legends, at The Hollywood Museum in the Max Factor Building in Los Angeles. This move is part of BSEG's strategy to expand into beauty-focused content and consumer products. The company's stock symbol on the OTC market is BSEG.

data.title: Klarna reports triple-digit spending growth in entertainment (+130%), experiences (+115%), and automotive (100%) this holiday season. Shift towards high-value purchases noted.
data.description: Klarna, a worldwide digital bank and flexible payment service, has announced a surge in holiday spending in the U.S. that goes beyond typical retail transactions. The data shows that consumers have contributed to a threefold increase in spending compared to last year in categories like entertainment (+130%), experiences (+115%), and automotive products (+100%), which includes expenses related to vehicle maintenance and repairs. This remarkable growth was observed from December 1 to December 22, indicating a noticeable trend towards experiential activities and valuable practical purchases this holiday season.

data.title: MGM Resorts International extends branding agreement with MGM China through 2032 concession term.
data.description: MGM China has approved the extension of the right to utilize the "MGM" brand name until 2032 under the current concession term. The agreement also includes an automatic extension clause in the event of obtaining another concession. This decision was confirmed on December 23, 2025. MGM Resorts International, listed under NYSE as MGM, spearheaded this initiative. The company has signed a fresh contract to prolong the use of the brand name.

data.title: Q3 2025: Global oil & gas industry contracts value drops to $36.48B, contract count falls to 1,386 from 1,651 last quarter.
data.description: In the recent Q3 2025 report on the global oil and gas industry contracts, it was noted that there was a decline in both the total disclosed value and the number of contracts compared to the previous quarter. The total disclosed value decreased from $41.22 billion in Q2 2025 to $36.48 billion in Q3 2025. Additionally, the number of contracts decreased from 1,651 in Q2 2025 to 1,386 in Q3. Noteworthy contributors to upstream contract activity in this quarter were Dopet, COOEC, and L&T Energy Hydrocarbon. This information has been included in the latest offering from ResearchAndMarkets.com.

data.title: Raythink in Yantai, China uses thermal imaging to improve fire safety during Christmas season with increased fire risks due to higher electrical loads and heating equipment use.
data.description: In YANTAI, China, on December 23, 2025, concerns are mounting over fire hazards during the festive season. The increased use of electricity, heating devices, and decreased staff presence are raising fire risks in industrial sites, commercial properties, and vital infrastructure. This trend poses significant threats to safety and property. In light of this, measures are being implemented to mitigate these risks and ensure a safe environment during the holiday period.

data.title: Gold is nearing a new $4.5K high as Bitcoin's bullish indicators emerge, despite remaining below $90K, with a whale initiating multimillion-dollar crypto shorts.
data.description: Bitcoin exhibited positive indicators relative to gold and the US dollar, despite trading below the $90,000 mark. A major investor initiated significant short positions in the cryptocurrency market, amounting to millions of dollars.
